description: Ingestion adapter and deduplication pipeline contract.
ingestion_run_rule: A workspace ingestion run selects enabled workspace_source_links, executes the registered adapters, persists raw_items idempotently, and records run-level source success/failure plus raw created/updated counts. Schedulers and workers must call this same service layer instead of bypassing adapters.
adapter_rule: Each source type may have its own input structure, but every adapter must persist the full raw payload and emit canonical raw_items. Normalization enriches and maps fields; it must not discard the original payload.

dedupe_stage.reason: Different source structures must first be normalized before they can be compared fairly. Scoring should only run on deduped winners.
hard_dedupe_key_order: normalized_title + published_date_bucket when canonical_url is missing
canonical_url_rules: remove tracking query params such as utm_*, spm, ref, ref_src, fbclid, gclid
representative_selection_order: source_kind priority: wiseflow gets legacy bonus because it may contain richer crawled material

result_fields.loser: active = false, duplicate_of = winner.id or winner.candidate_key
result_fields.all_items: raw_items remain preserved; dedupe never deletes raw records

soft_clustering_stage.purpose: Group same-topic items across different URLs without automatically deleting them.
soft_clustering_stage.rule: Soft clusters support editor review and weekly aggregation; they do not replace hard dedupe in phase 1.
